reason: Frontend stack and working rules for feature-local migration boundaries.
Current ownership rules for app-level auth state, feature-level state, and persisted session state.
When to use lifecycle methods versus hooks during migrated feature boundaries.
Shared Request wrapper and response contract behavior must remain unchanged during migration.
Guardrails for scope control, request handling, and avoiding architecture drift.
UI composition rules for touched page widgets.
Directory and file-placement expectations when renaming or relocating provider-shaped files.
